About

Who I am.

I am a systems engineer and researcher pursuing my MS at the University of Washington.

I design infrastructure from scratch and work best in ambiguity.

Currently interested in ML/AI and the systems that facilitate it — high-performance computing, parallel systems, and beyond.

N-Body Simulation
